name: German Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter (or margarine) and set aside.
2. Combine the sugar and baking cocoa in a bowl.
3. Stir in the evaporated milk, eggs, melted butter (or margarine), and vanilla, blending well.
4. Add the coconut and pecans to the mixture and stir until combined.
5. Spoon the filling into two unbaked 9-inch pie shells.
6. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for 40 minutes or until set around the edges.
7. Cool on racks.
Makes 2 pies of 6 servings each.
